name: mostParamGetData
title: mostParamGetData
syntax: long mostParamGetData(mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[], byte buffer[], long buffersize)
description: Query of parameters of the String type or RawStream from an AMS message using the parameter name from the XML function catalog.
With strings, the coding and scheduling in the message are taken into account.
The message data must contain a parameter with the given parameter address.

Since the compiler is not able to validate this, errors are detected at run time of the CAPL program only. If the parameter is not part of the message or not the expected type, an error text is displayed in the Write Window and the measurement stops. The function mostParamIsAvailable can be applied to assure parameter availability.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Message from which the parameter value should be read.

return:
>=0: Number of copied bytes.
<0: See error codes
